summary: Comprehensive testing of Bulk Attendance Marking and Present No Charge features completed. All 14 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI features verified and working correctly via Playwright automation.

bulk_mode_toggle.description: Bulk Mode button toggles between 'Bulk Mode' and 'Exit Bulk Mode' state correctly

select_all_button.description: Select All button selects all 4 students, counter shows '4 selected'

deselect_all_button.description: Deselect All button clears selection, counter shows '0 selected'

individual_card_selection.description: Clicking individual cards toggles their selection state in bulk mode

mark_selected_dialog.description: Mark Selected button opens dialog with status dropdown (present, absent, late, present_no_charge)

bulk_present_status.description: Bulk marking with 'present' status works via both API and UI

bulk_present_no_charge.description: Bulk marking with 'present_no_charge' status shows reason dropdown and persists correctly

mark_all_present_quick_action.description: All Present button marks all students as present, shows toast 'Marked N students as present'

mark_all_absent_quick_action.description: All Absent button marks all students as absent (verified via API)

single_click_cycling.description: Status cycle works: present -> absent -> late -> present_no_charge -> present

present_no_charge_reason_dialog.description: Clicking to present_no_charge opens reason dialog with 5 options: trial, makeup, scholarship, free_session, other

status_display_icons.description: All 4 statuses show correct icons and colors: green checkmark (present), red X (absent), yellow clock (late), purple gift (present_no_charge)

seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data: 4 students (Shristi Nagaria, Rahul Sharma, Priya Patel, Amit Kumar), 3 classes
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bulk attendance features working correctly. Backend APIs: POST /api/attendance (single), POST /api/attendance/bulk (bulk), POST /api/attendance/mark-all (mark all). Frontend uses data-testid attributes: toggle-bulk-mode-btn, select-all-btn, deselect-all-btn, bulk-mark-btn, bulk-status-select, bulk-no-charge-reason-select, mark-all-present-btn, mark-all-absent-btn, no-charge-reason-select, confirm-no-charge-btn, attendance-card-{studentId}
apis_tested: POST /api/attendance - Mark single attendance with all 4 status types
POST /api/attendance - Mark present_no_charge with all 5 reason types (trial, makeup, scholarship, free_session, other)
POST /api/attendance/bulk - Bulk mark attendance for multiple students
POST /api/attendance/bulk - Bulk mark with mixed statuses
POST /api/attendance/bulk - Bulk mark present_no_charge with reasons
POST /api/attendance/mark-all - Mark all students as present
POST /api/attendance/mark-all - Mark all students as absent
GET /api/attendance - Get attendance records by class and date
